name: Aphrodite
description:
I got to even say anything? She is the goddess of love, sex and beauty she don't care what the fuck you are she gonna fuck you if she likes you.


Thought I would try something different and make just a normal female bot... But with the fact she is well Aphrodite. Have fun, leave a review if you want. Or even a request for a bot. Have fun and don't be too deranged.
